asset_name: Shield Noble — Idle with frontal shield (4f @ 6fps)

silhouette_notes: Shield reads as simple arc rim + plate.

acceptance_criteria: Deliverable PNG matches the specified pixel dimensions (or sprite-sheet total size) with transparent background.
Uses the project palette as a guideline; any additional colors are limited and documented in specs.colors_hex.
Silhouette/readability holds at 100% and 50% zoom; no muddy edges or unintended blurs.
shared_properties: noble court costume family with ink brown outline and dusty rose garments
hand-drawn 2D rendering with soft shading and thin outline
4-frame idle readability requirement for a front-facing noble silhouette
differences: uses a 40x52 px frame to accommodate a frontal shield silhouette
adds shield-facing defensive posture while preserving idle timing at 4 frames and 6 fps
includes shield metal and slate accents in specs.colors_hex for the prop surface
